mapper.sql: id, sub_restaurant_id, sub_restaurant_name, in_people, income, report_matters, create_time, remark, id_delete, user_id, report_time,sub_scenic_id
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id as id , a.sub_restaurant_id as restaurantId , a.sub_restaurant_name as restaurantName , a.income as income , a.user_id as userId , report_base_restaurant.contact_people as contactPeople , report_base_restaurant.contact_phone as contactPhone , report_base_restaurant.restaurant_phone as scenicPhone , a.report_time as reportTime FROM(SELECT * FROM base_restaurant_report ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT 1000) a left join report_base_restaurant on a.sub_restaurant_id = report_base_restaurant.id where id_delete = 0
and (a.sub_restaurant_name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.id like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.income like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_restaurant.contact_people like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_restaurant.contact_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or report_base_restaurant.restaurant_phone like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or a.report_time like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )
GROUP BY a.sub_restaurant_id
SELECT id,report_time,income from base_restaurant_report where user_id = #{restaurantId} and report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0 order by report_time desc
select * from base_restaurant_report where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0 order by report_time desc
select sum(income) from base_restaurant_report where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and id_delete = 0

select scenic_name scenicName,sum(income) income from base_restaurant_report restaurant join report_base_scenic scenic where sub_scenic_id = scenic.id and restaurant.id_delete = 0 and scenic.is_delete = 0 and report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} GROUP BY scenic_name
